title: School uniforms
text: This house believes school uniforms should be mandatory in all schools.

title: Ban homework
text: This house believes homework should be banned for students under sixteen.

title: Social media age limit
text: This house believes social media platforms should be restricted to users aged sixteen and above.

title: End standardized testing
text: This house believes standardized testing should be abolished in schools.

title: Four-day school week
text: This house believes schools should adopt a four-day school week.

title: Mobile phones in class
text: This house believes mobile phones should be banned in classrooms.

title: Mandatory second language
text: This house believes learning a second language should be mandatory in every school.

title: Plant-based cafeteria
text: This house believes school cafeterias should serve only plant-based meals.
